GGB.notes: Steel sector, follows Brazil market, earnings sensitive

AMC.notes: Meme stock, short squeeze potential, high volume

KB_Drift_Fix.issue: Multiple files had different target prices - state.json, AGENTS.md, portfolio.md, rules.md all out of sync
KB_Drift_Fix.fix: Made state.json the single source of truth, deprecated rules.md to point to state.json
KB_Drift_Fix.lesson: Always use state.json as canonical source; subagent reads it directly

trade_tracking.format: User says: 'executed BUY GGB 5@4.20' or 'executed SELL GGB 2.5@4.45'
trade_tracking.how_it_works: 1. On BUY: log to open_positions in trades.json. 2. On SELL: calculate real P/L, log to trades[], create lesson in learnings.json with type TRADE_PNL

lessons.note: Price approaching 52W high (4.66) and within target range. Upcoming Q1 earnings Apr 27 may cause volatility. Consider tightening sell target if volatility rises.
